zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah Cagle於1799年出生在美國田納西州時，她的父親Henry Cagle29歲，母親Maria Elizabeth Wagner24歲。她於大約1814年與Cornelius Diffee在美國田納西州林肯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1828年享年29歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah Cagle于1799年出生在美国田纳西州时，她的父亲Henry Cagle29岁，母亲Maria Elizabeth Wagner24岁。她于大约1814年与Cornelius Diffee在美国田纳西州林肯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1828年享年29岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cagle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of German Kagel , Kegel , Kögel or Kogel .

variants.name: Kagel
meanings: metonymic occupational name for a maker of hoods or hooded robes and cloaks, from Low German Kogel, Kagel (from Latin cuculla ‘sphere’).

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

historicEvents.title: Movement to Washington D.C.
historicEvents.description: While the growth of the new nation was exponential, the United States didn’t have permanent location to house the Government. The First capital was temporary in New York City but by the second term of George Washington the Capital moved to Philadelphia for the following 10 years. Ultimately during the Presidency of John Adams, the Capital found a permanent home in the District of Columbia.
France sells Louisiana territories to U.S.A.
War of 1812. U.S. declares war on Britain over British interference with American maritime shipping and westward expansion.

historicEvents.title: Panic! of 1819
historicEvents.description: With the Aftermath of the Napoleonic Wars the global market for trade was down. During this time, America had its first financial crisis and it lasted for only two years.

historicEvents.title: Making States Equal
historicEvents.description: The Missouri Compromise helped provide the entrance of Maine as a free state and Missouri as a slave state into the United States. As part of the compromise, slavery was prohibited north of the 36°30′ parallel, excluding Missouri.

historicEvents.title: The Crimes Act
historicEvents.description: The Crimes Act was made to provide a clearer punishment of certain crimes against the United States. Part of it includes: Changing the maximum sentence of imprisonment to be increased from seven to ten years and changing the maximum fine from $5,000 to $10,000.

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah Cagle was born in 1799, in Tennessee, United States, her father, Henry Cagle, was 29 and her mother, Maria Elizabeth Wagner, was 24. She married Cornelius Diffee about 1814, in Lincoln, Tennessee, United States. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1828, at the age of 29.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sarah Cagle est née en 1799, à Tennessee, États-Unis, son père, Henry Cagle, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Maria Elizabeth Wagner, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Cornelius Diffee environ 1814, à Lincoln, Tennessee, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1828, à l’âge de 29 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sarah Cagle 1799 in Tennessee, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Cagle 29 und ihre Mutter Maria Elizabeth Wagner 24. Sie hat um 1814 in Lincoln, Tennessee, Vereinigte Staaten Cornelius Diffee geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1828 im Alter von 29 Jahren.

Lei sposato Cornelius Diffee circa 1814, nel Lincoln, Tennessee, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1828, all'età di 29 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Cagleが1799年にアメリカ合衆国テネシー州で生まれた時，父Henry Cagleは29歳，母Maria Elizabeth Wagnerは24歳であった。約1814年にアメリカ合衆国テネシー州リンコルンでCornelius Diffeeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1828年に29歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Cagle(이)가 1799년 미국 테네시 주에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Cagle(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maria Elizabeth Wagner(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1814년 미국 테네시 주 링코컨에서 Cornelius Diffee(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1828년 29세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Cornelius Diffee aproximadamente 1814, em Lincoln, Tenessi, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1828, com 29 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah Cagle родилась в 1799 г. в местности Теннесси, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени Henry Cagle было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Maria Elizabeth Wagner, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Cornelius Diffee около 1814 г. в местности линколн, Теннесси, Соединенные штаты. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1828 г. в возрасте 29 лет.
